11.description: Added doc = false to [[bin]] in motif_debug_cli/Cargo.toml. Issue #11 closed by maintainer (completed).

workspace_deps.description: Populated [workspace.dependencies] with shared external + internal crates; all 5 workspace members migrated to workspace = true; motif_test migrated to workspace package metadata.

contributing_docs.description: Added CONTRIBUTING.md with prerequisites, project layout, building, testing (TDD philosophy), code style, debug CLI, spool, and PR submission guide.

dep_audit.notes: Ran cargo metadata on Linux. All 5 workspace packages resolve correctly. [workspace.dependencies] is empty (PR #16 addresses). Individual crates use reasonable semver pins. Could not run cargo outdated (macOS required for full Metal build). Feature branches (feature/devtools, feature/focus-system, feature/hot-reload, feature/input-system, feature/quad-borders) exist on GitHub but predate current main — fewer source files present.

notes: Run 4 (22652719576): Created PR #17 (CONTRIBUTING.md). Did Task 4 dep audit via cargo metadata. Explored feature branches on GitHub — they exist but have fewer files than main (predate current main). Next priorities: Task 6 (stale nudge on PRs #16/#17 after 14 days), Task 8 (release — still no tags, early dev), Task 9 (new contributors). Consider investigating feature branch status for maintainer.
